title: PayPal Reports Fourth Quarter And Full Year 2025 Results
text: PayPal released fourth quarter and full year 2025 results on February 3, 2026. Company delivered solid financial performance with consistent payment volume growth. Full-year 2025 revenue reached approximately $26+ billion with year-over-year growth of approximately 5-6%. Non-GAAP EPS for full year 2025 was approximately $5.31. Maintained strong cash generation with free cash flow exceeding $5 billion. Share repurchase activity totaled approximately $4-5 billion.
